badges.description: CSUN staff and faculty who earn this badge are recognized for integrating career development into their work and empowering students to succeed beyond graduation.
badges.meaning:
The CSUN Career Champions Badge is awarded to staff and faculty who have successfully completed the CSUN Career Center’s Career Champions program. Badge earners are recognized as dedicated CSUN professionals who actively integrate career development into their work with students.

Through this program, participants gain practical strategies to connect academic pathways with real-world opportunities, support student persistence, and guide students in their transition to meaningful careers. Career Champions are equipped with tools to enhance advising and student interactions—helping students build confidence in selecting majors, exploring career options, and planning for life after graduation.

Earning this badge reflects a commitment to ongoing professional growth and to fostering a campus-wide culture where career readiness is a shared responsibility among faculty and staff.
badges.criteria: To earn this badge, participants must complete the Career Champions course, including all modules, activities, and assessments.

Through this program, participants gain practical strategies to connect academic pathways with real-world opportunities, support student persistence, and guide students in their transition to meaningful careers. Career Champions are equipped with tools to enhance advising and student interactions—helping students build confidence in selecting majors, exploring career options, and planning for life after graduation.

Earning this badge reflects a commitment to ongoing professional growth and to fostering a campus-wide culture where career readiness is a shared responsibility among faculty and staff.
badges.criteria: To earn this badge, participants must complete the Career Champions course, including all modules, activities, and assessments.
badges.evidenceDescription:
Pre- and post-program questionnaire responses
Participation verification from Career Champion sessions
Follow-up survey responses demonstrating applied learning
standards: NACE Career Readiness Competencies
NASPA/ACPA Professional Competencies for Student Affairs Educators
badges.issuerVerificationNote: Issued directly by the CSUN Career Center and maintained in the official credential registry.

badges.description: Awarded to students who have taken action to explore their career path, engage with Career Center resources, and build a personalized plan for their future.
badges.publicSummary: Awarded to students who have taken action to explore their career path, engage with Career Center resources, and build a personalized plan for their future.
badges.meaning: The Career Activated badge represents a turning point, where exploration becomes action. Recipients have moved beyond uncertainty by identifying their strengths, exploring career options, and actively using CSUN Career Center tools to create a clear, personalized path forward.
badges.criteria:
Complete all course modules and video content
Participate in all required reflections and activities
Activate and complete their Handshake profile
Engage with Career Center tools
Complete the Career Journey Assessment
standards: Aligned with NACE Career Readiness Competencies
badges.issuerVerificationNote: Official credential records are maintained by the CSUN Career Center.

emailAwardTemplates.name: Default award email
emailAwardTemplates.subject: Your {badge-name} Badge Has Been Awarded
emailAwardTemplates.bodyPlain:
Hello {recipient-name},

Congratulations on earning the {badge-name} Badge and successfully completing all of the required steps to achieve it. This accomplishment reflects your dedication, effort, and commitment to your professional growth, and we are excited to celebrate this milestone with you.

Your official e-badge is included below and is now ready for you to use. You can proudly display it on LinkedIn, add it to your digital portfolio, or share it across your social media platforms to highlight your achievement and showcase your continued career development.

We hope this badge serves as both a recognition of what you have accomplished and a reminder to keep building momentum as you continue your journey toward success.

Badge: {badge-link}

Rise like a Matador.

Best regards,
{sender-name}
